scripts.start-all: concurrently "npm run start-user" "npm run start-product" "npm run start-order" "npm run start-payment" "npm run start-gateway"
scripts.dev-all: concurrently "npm run dev-user" "npm run dev-product" "npm run dev-order" "npm run dev-payment" "npm run dev-gateway"
scripts.install-all: npm install && cd user-service && npm install && cd ../product-service && npm install && cd ../order-service && npm install && cd ../payment-service && npm install && cd ../api-gateway && npm install
